'''鈭歷-y-d-th''' ('''kavaydethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forbleed|forbleed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forbleed|forbleed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-y-d-th
|-
! Lemma
| kavaydethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivaydethoko|thivaydethoko]] || [[word:jivaydethoko|jivaydethoko]] || [[word:shivaydethoko|shivaydethoko]] || [[word:kivaydethoko|kivaydethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvaydethoko|thuthuvaydethoko]] || [[word:jujuvaydethoko|jujuvaydethoko]] || [[word:shushuvaydethoko|shushuvaydethoko]] || [[word:kukuvaydethoko|kukuvaydethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvaydethoko|thuvaydethoko]] || [[word:juvaydethoko|juvaydethoko]] || [[word:shuvaydethoko|shuvaydethoko]] || [[word:kuvaydethoko|kuvaydethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvaydethoko|thuvaydethoko]] || [[word:juvaydethoko|juvaydethoko]] || [[word:shuvaydethoko|shuvaydethoko]] || [[word:kuvaydethoko|kuvaydethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovaydethoko|thovaydethoko]] || [[word:jovaydethoko|jovaydethoko]] || [[word:shovaydethoko|shovaydethoko]] || [[word:kovaydethoko|kovaydethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovaydethoko|thovaydethoko]] || [[word:jovaydethoko|jovaydethoko]] || [[word:shovaydethoko|shovaydethoko]] || [[word:kovaydethoko|kovaydethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vaydethoko|th忙vaydethoko]] || [[word:j忙vaydethoko|j忙vaydethoko]] || [[word:sh忙vaydethoko|sh忙vaydethoko]] || [[word:k忙vaydethoko|k忙vaydethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavaydethoko|thathavaydethoko]] || [[word:jajavaydethoko|jajavaydethoko]] || [[word:shashavaydethoko|shashavaydethoko]] || [[word:kakavaydethoko|kakavaydethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavaydethoko|thavaydethoko]] || [[word:javaydethoko|javaydethoko]] || [[word:shavaydethoko|shavaydethoko]] || [[word:kavaydethoko|kavaydethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavaydethoko|thavaydethoko]] || [[word:javaydethoko|javaydethoko]] || [[word:shavaydethoko|shavaydethoko]] || [[word:kavaydethoko|kavaydethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
